title: Palindrome Kontrolu
subtitle: Kelime ve sayilarin palindrome testi.
code:
<?php

function isPalindrome(string $text): bool {
    $cleaned = str_replace(" ", "", strtolower($text));
    $reversed = strrev($cleaned);
    return $cleaned === $reversed;
}

function isNumberPalindrome(int $number): bool {
    $text = (string)$number;
    return $text === strrev($text);
}

$words = ["kayak", "araba", "anna", "elma", "a man a plan a canal panama"];

echo "Kelime testleri:\n";
foreach ($words as $word) {
    echo "'" . $word . "' palindrome mu: " . (isPalindrome($word) ? "evet" : "hayir") . "\n";
}

echo "\nSayi testleri:\n";
$numbers = [12321, 12345, 1001, 5];
foreach ($numbers as $num) {
    echo $num . " palindrome mu: " . (isNumberPalindrome($num) ? "evet" : "hayir") . "\n";
}

?>
